name: Trimble Viewpoint Construction ERP API
what_it_does: Trimble Viewpoint (Vista and Spectrum) construction ERP REST API for job costing, project management, and construction financial operations. Enables AI agents to manage job cost tracking and budget variance for construction accounting automation, handle certified payroll and prevailing wage compliance for public works contractors, access project management and field operations data for construction workflow coordination, retrieve WIP schedule and cash flow analysis for construction business intelligence, manage accounts payable and subcontractor compliance for construction payment automation, handle AIA progress billing and retainage management for owner billing, access equipment management and cost allocation for construction asset tracking, retrieve HR and workforce management data for construction labor operations, manage document control and submittal tracking for construction project compliance, and integrate Viewpoint with Procore, Trimble Connect, and construction supply chain platforms.
use_cases: Processing job costs from construction ERP agents
Generating AIA billing from project billing agents
Managing certified payroll from compliance agents
Tracking subcontractor compliance from payment agents
not_for: Residential homebuilders (use Buildertrend or Builder Prime)
Simple accounting without construction-specific ERP needs
best_when: A mid-to-large general contractor, specialty contractor, or construction company using Trimble Viewpoint Vista or Spectrum wanting AI agents to automate job costing, certified payroll, AIA billing, subcontractor compliance, and construction financial reporting.
avoid_when: CERTIFIED PAYROLL WAGE RATE ACCURACY: Automated Davis-Bacon certified payroll in Vista must apply current DOL wage determination rates by trade classification and county; Viewpoint stores wage rates in tables that require regular refresh from WD.gov; stale rates create DOL back-pay liability. Vista vs Spectrum API differences — Trimble offers both Vista (Windows-based .NET) and Spectrum (cloud) with different API architectures; verify which product your customer uses before building integrations; API endpoints and authentication differ significantly between products. Trimble acquisition consolidation — Viewpoint was acquired by Trimble in 2016; API strategy continues evolving under Trimble Construction One platform; verify current API stability and consolidation roadmap before committing to integration.

auth.notes: Trimble Viewpoint uses OAuth 2.0 (Spectrum/cloud) and API key (Vista/on-premise). REST API with JSON. Portland, Oregon HQ. Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ: TRMB). Founded 1978 (Trimble); Viewpoint acquired 2016. Public. Trimble $3.6B+ annual revenue. 4,000+ construction company customers. Vista: Windows-based on-premise ERP. Spectrum: Cloud SaaS ERP. Trimble Construction One platform consolidating Vista, Spectrum, Viewpoint, and Stratus. Competes with Sage 300 CRE, Foundation Software, and CMiC for construction ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; Vista on-premise and Spectrum cloud pricing differ
pricing.notes: Portland OR. Trimble NASDAQ:TRMB. $3.6B+ revenue. Viewpoint acquired 2016. 4,000+ construction customers. Vista (on-premise) and Spectrum (cloud) products.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client (Spectrum) or API key (Vista); documented in partner integration portal

known_agent_gotchas: VISTA VS SPECTRUM API ARCHITECTURE MISMATCH: Trimble Vista (on-premise) and Spectrum (cloud SaaS) have fundamentally different API architectures, authentication, and endpoint structures; an integration built for one product will not work with the other; confirm product before building

Trimble Construction One consolidation risk — Trimble is consolidating Vista, Spectrum, and Viewpoint under Construction One platform; API endpoints and integration patterns may change as consolidation proceeds; verify current roadmap with Trimble partner team before long-term integration investment

Davis-Bacon wage rate tables require manual refresh — Vista stores prevailing wage rates in configuration tables; automated certified payroll uses stored rates without automatic DOL refresh; implement scheduled wage rate update from DOL WD.gov before each payroll cycle

Retainage release automation — automated retainage release in AIA billing must follow contract terms and lien waiver exchange; premature automated retainage release without proper documentation creates owner dispute and lien exposure

On-premise Vista API network dependency — Vista API requires network connectivity to on-premise SQL Server; cloud AI agents need VPN or API gateway to reach on-premise Vista installations; plan network architecture before deployment

Subcontractor compliance holds — automated payment release must check insurance certificate expiration, license status, and lien waiver receipt; Viewpoint does not enforce compliance gates in API; implement compliance check in payment automation workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. OAuth2 (Spectrum) / API key (Vista). US/CA/AU/UK. Job cost, payroll, and construction financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/CA/AU/UK. Job cost and payroll data.
